headline: DuPont Collaborates with Uncountable to Advance AI-Ready Labs Strategy
summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced a strategic collaboration with Uncountable, an AI-driven platform for end-to-end product and application development, to advance its AI-ready labs initiative. The collaboration marks a major step forward in how DuPont scales digital lab workflows, expands access to high-quality experimental data, and turns insights into faster, more efficient innovation across its R&D organization helping customers bring solutions to market with greater speed, consistency, and c
